posts.post_text: 🔋 𝗠𝗮𝗷𝗼𝗿 𝗠𝗶𝗹𝗲𝘀𝘁𝗼𝗻𝗲 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝗠𝗜𝗥𝗔𝗜 𝗣𝗼𝘄𝗲𝗿We are pleased to announce that Foresight Group has invested in MIRAI Power through its 𝗙𝗼𝗿𝗲𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗵𝘁 𝗘𝗻𝗲𝗿𝗴𝘆 𝗜𝗻𝗳𝗿𝗮𝘀𝘁𝗿𝘂𝗰𝘁𝘂𝗿𝗲 𝗣𝗮𝗿𝘁𝗻𝗲𝗿𝘀 𝗜𝗜 𝗳𝘂𝗻𝗱.This partnership marks a significant step forward in our mission to accelerate the deployment of battery energy storage systems (BESS) across Germany. With Foresight’s support, we are strengthening our ability to:▪️ Scale our project pipeline▪️ Accelerate execution of grid-secured projects▪️ Expand in key BESS markets▪️ Contribute to a more flexible and resilient energy systemThe BESS market is evolving rapidly, and the ability to execute has never been more critical. Together with Foresight, we are well positioned to move efficiently from development to delivery. We would like to extend our sincere thanks to everyone involved in making this milestone possible - including Thomas Schubert and Dentons #team and Marco Vilardo for his relentless dedication to the deal. More details can be found here:https://lnkd.in/deQ7w_TJIf you would like to learn more, please feel free to contact us directly or connect with Julian Gerstner at the 𝗕𝗮𝘁𝘁𝗲𝗿𝘆 𝗕𝘂𝘀𝗶𝗻𝗲𝘀𝘀 𝗗𝗲𝘃𝗲𝗹𝗼𝗽𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁 𝗙𝗼𝗿𝘂𝗺 𝗶𝗻 𝗙𝗿𝗮𝗻𝗸𝗳𝘂𝗿𝘁 𝘁𝗼𝗺𝗼𝗿𝗿𝗼𝘄 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗪𝗲𝗱𝗻𝗲𝘀𝗱𝗮𝘆.#EnergyStorage #BESS #EnergyTransition #Infrastructure #Renewables #BatteryStorage… more

SRP and Invenergy Launch First-Ever Partnership To Add 200 MW Solar And 200 MW Battery Storage In Arizona’s SunDog Energy Center

Salt River Project and Invenergy have formed a partnership to develop the SunDog Energy Center in Pinal County, adding 200 megawatts of solar power and 200 megawatts of battery storage. This project aims to enhance Arizona's energy capacity, supporting 45,000 homes and creating substantial economic benefits, including job creation and local revenue....… more

GFCL EV Products has raised $80 million in fresh funding to accelerate expansion of its EV battery materials operations, taking total funding to $130 million. The company aims to scale production of advanced materials used in lithium-ion batteries and cater to rising demand from electric mobility and energy storage sectors. The move underscores increasing investor interest in India’s EV supply chain ecosystem.#EVNews #evnewsindia #gfclevproducts #GFCL #electricvehicles #electricvehiclesarethefuture #electricvehiclesindia… more

As our EU-funded Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) project, titled RRF-6.5.1-23-2024-00064, approaches its conclusion, we believe it is essential to share the knowledge and insights we possess regarding this topic.We are pleased to introduce a new series of articles aimed at engaging local communities. Through these publications, we will explore the realities of today’s grid infrastructure, the challenges it faces, and the critical role that BESS can play in building a more resilient and flexible energy system.Our first article focuses on a fundamental concept: the importance of maintaining balance within the energy system. As renewable energy sources continue to expand, ensuring stability between supply and demand becomes increasingly complex, and increasingly vital.By opening up this conversation, we hope to contribute to a better understanding of both the opportunities and the limitations of the current grid, while highlighting how energy storage solutions can support the transition to a more sustainable future.Stay tuned for more insights as we continue this series.https://lnkd.in/d-zYieKF… more

HP Envy x360 15-fe1082wm | Intel Core Ultra 7-155U | 16GB LPDDR5 | 512GB PCIe NVMe | 15.6" FHD IPS Touch 360° | Wi-Fi 6E | Win 11. The premium convertible built on Intel's current-generation AI platform.The HP Envy x360 15-fe1082wm sits at the top of HP's consumer convertible lineup. The specification is worth examining closely because the Core Ultra 7-155U platform represents a genuine architectural shift — not an incremental generation update.Processor first — why Core Ultra matters:Intel Core Ultra 7-155U — 12 cores, 14 threads, boost to 4.8GHz, 12MB L3 cache, built on Intel 4 process. The Core Ultra series integrates a dedicated Neural Processing Unit on the die — enabling AI workloads including Microsoft Copilot, real-time camera processing, and AI-accelerated productivity features to run locally on the NPU without CPU load or battery drain. This is the Copilot+ PC architecture that most business laptops in the current market still don't qualify for.Full specification for procurement:— HP Envy x360 15-fe1082wm | 9R1K0UA — Processor: Intel Core Ultra 7-155U | 12 cores | up to 4.8GHz | NPU — RAM: 16GB LPDDR5 — Storage: 512GB PCIe NVMe SSD — Display: 15.6" FHD IPS Touch | 1920x1080 | 300 nits | micro-edge | multi-touch — Hinge: 360-degree — Laptop, Tent, Stand, Tablet modes — Wireless: Wi-Fi 6E | Bluetooth — Keyboard: Backlit | Copilot key — Ports: 2x USB-C | 2x USB-A | HDMI 2.1 | combo audio jack — Charging: HP Fast Charge — 0 to 50% in ~30 minutes — Battery: up to 10 hours 15 minutes — Security: Privacy Shutter Door camera | Walk Away Lock — OS: Windows 11 Home — Build: Recycled aluminium | Energy Star certified — Color: Mineral SilverRelevant for professional procurement:The 360-degree form factor is the primary use-case differentiator versus standard clamshells. For professionals who present to clients, annotate documents with touch, or need tablet mode for field work — the Envy x360 eliminates the need for a separate tablet device. Wi-Fi 6E is relevant for high-density office environments where Wi-Fi 6 congestion is a known issue. HP Fast Charge minimises downtime between sessions.Available now at AZC Electronics, Deira Dubai. Volume pricing available on request.azcstore.com | UAE-wide delivery DM for trade pricing and availability#HPEnvyx360 #EnvyX360 #CoreUltra7 #IntelCoreUltra #AIPC #CopilotPC #2in1Laptop #ConvertibleLaptop #WiFi6E #TechDubai #UAETech #AZCElectronics #azcstore #ITInfrastructure #TechProcurement #BusinessLaptop #PremiumLaptop #DubaiTech #Windows11 #HPLaptop… more

𝐈𝐦𝐦𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐂𝐨𝐨𝐥𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐄𝐕 𝐁𝐚𝐭𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐲 𝐌𝐚𝐫𝐤𝐞𝐭 𝐎𝐮𝐭𝐥𝐨𝐨𝐤 𝟐𝟎𝟐𝟔–𝟐𝟑𝟎𝟔 | 𝐍𝐨𝐯𝐚𝐭𝐫𝐞𝐧𝐝𝐬 𝐌𝐚𝐫𝐤𝐞𝐭 𝐈𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐥𝐥𝐢𝐠𝐞𝐧𝐜𝐞The global immersion cooling for EV battery market is entering a high-growth phase, fueled by the accelerating shift toward electric mobility and next-gen battery performance requirements.Immersion cooling is emerging as a game-changing technology, enabling superior thermal management, enhanced safety, and extended battery lifecycle by directly submerging battery cells in dielectric fluids.As EV manufacturers push for higher energy density and fast-charging capabilities, advanced cooling solutions are becoming mission-critical across automotive and energy storage ecosystems.𝗕𝘆 𝗧𝘆𝗽𝗲: Single-phase Cooling, Two-phase Cooling 𝗕𝘆 𝗔𝗽𝗽𝗹𝗶𝗰𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻: Electric Vehicles, Energy Storage Systems 𝗕𝘆 𝗥𝗲𝗴𝗶𝗼𝗻: North America, Europe, Asia-Pacific, Middle East & Africa𝗕𝘆 𝗟𝗲𝗮𝗱𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗞𝗲𝘆 𝗣𝗹𝗮𝗬𝗘𝗥𝗦: 3M, Shell, Castrol👉 𝗔𝘀𝗸 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝘀𝗮𝗺𝗽𝗹𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗽𝗼𝗿𝘁𝘀, 𝗰𝘂𝘀𝘁𝗼𝗺𝗶𝘇𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻, 𝗼𝗿 𝘀𝘁𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗴𝗶𝗰 𝗶𝗻𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗵𝘁𝘀.https://lnkd.in/d3KC5jdZ#EV #BatteryTechnology #Cooling #ElectricVehicles #EnergyStorage #FutureMobility #MarketInsights… more

posts.post_text: Most people use batteries every day, but very few truly understand how they work.Lithium-ion batteries are not just technology, they are the foundation of the global energy transition. From smartphones to large-scale systems like BESS (Battery Energy Storage System), understanding how batteries work is key to:⚡ Improving energy efficiency⚡ Enabling renewable energy integration⚡ Maintaining grid stability📊 Industry Insight:As renewable energy adoption continues to grow, the demand for BESS is rapidly increasing - not only at the utility level, but also across industrial and commercial sectors.Understanding batteries today means understanding the future of energy.If you’re interested in learning more from fundamentals to real world applications, you can explore it here:👉 bit.ly/BS-APRIL-26#Battery #BESS #EnergyStorage #RenewableEnergy #EnergyTransition #NBRI #BatterySchool… more

posts.author_headline: Norwegian duo targets next wave of maritime electrification - Splash247
posts.post_text: Norwegian duo targets next wave of maritime electrification.Corvus Energy and Norwegian battery developer Beyonder have signed a memorandum of understanding to explore next‑generation battery systems for shipping. The collaboration will assess new energy storage solutions that combine Corvus’ marine system experience with Beyonder’s lithium iron phosphate‑based cell technology, which is designed for high power and long life and is currently undergoing validation.Corvus, a cell‑agnostic supplier with systems delivered to more than 1,300 vessels, says it will continue data‑driven evaluation before any future product integration. The agreement stops short of a commercial supply deal, but lays the groundwork for further collaboration as demand grows for robust and efficient battery solutions in hybrid and fully electric operations.The partnership comes at a time when shipowners are increasingly looking for battery technologies that can support real operational profiles, particularly in short‑sea and offshore segments. Norway remains a leading market for maritime electrification, with over 100 battery‑powered ferries already in service.Source: Splash247#Shipping #Maritime #Electrification #MarineBatteries #HybridShipping #CleanTech #Ferries #Offshore… more

posts.author_headline: There may be movement in the shares of Coal India today, the company got an order worth Rs 1057 crore.
posts.post_text:
There may be movement in the shares of Coal India today, the company got an order worth Rs 1057 crore.

Coal India: There may be movement in the shares of Coal India, a giant government company associated with the mining sector in India, today because the company has received a big order worth Rs 1057.09 crore. The company has received this contract from Telangana Power Generation Corporation Limited (TGGENCO). Under this, Coal India will have to set up a large Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) plant in Choutuppal, Telangana....… more

posts.author_headline: Pakistan needs to declare a ‘battery emergency’ - Energy Storage
posts.post_text: Urgent Call: Why Pakistan Needs a ‘Battery Emergency’ 🔋🇵🇰Pakistan’s solar boom is making global headlines, but to sustain this growth, the focus must shift to Energy Storage. While solar imports hit 17 GW in 2024, Battery Energy Storage Systems (BESS) deployment must now accelerate to secure our energy future.The PSA Perspective: Bridging the GapPSA Chairman Waqas H. Moosa argues that the current challenge isn't overgeneration, but low demand. He calls for a BESS to address key areas:Tax Reform: PSA opposes the current 48% effective tax rate on imported BESS to make storage more accessible.Electrification: Promoting EVs and increased per capita consumption to stabilize the grid.Global Collaboration: Partnering with the World Bank and ADB to turn Pakistan into a "sandbox" for large-scale battery testing.The Future of StorageIndustry leaders like Usman Ahmad (CEO, Nizam Energy) predict a surge in "behind-the-meter" storage as net metering policies evolve. PSA remains committed to ensuring Pakistan’s transition is supported by a robust, storage-ready infrastructure.Read the full feature here: https://lnkd.in/diJMjPyK#PakistanSolarAssociation #BESS #BatteryEmergency #SolarPakistan #EnergyStorage #WaqasMoosa #NizamEnergy #Sustainability… more

posts.post_text: #1 in Residential Storage Cells — How REPT BATTERO Reversed a RMB 2B Loss in Just One YearOn March 26, 2026, REPT BATTERO released its 2025 annual results:💰 Revenue: RMB 24.33B (+36.7% YoY)📦 Shipments: 82.7GWh (+89.2% YoY)📈 Net profit: ~RMB 681M (first time profitable)👉 More importantly:The company was still in loss in 2024, and achieved a ~RMB 2B turnaround within one year.🔋 Energy storage becomes the core growth engine⚪ Revenue: RMB 13.56B (+86.8%)⚪ Gross profit: RMB 1.46B (+276.4%)Key signals:⚪ Included in Tier 1 (BloombergNEF) for 9 consecutive quarters⚪ #1 globally in residential storage cell shipments (#GGII / #SMM)⚪ Cells adopted by 3 of the Top 5 residential storage brands in Europe🚚 Power battery strategy: targeting heavy-duty vehiclesInstead of competing in the highly saturated passenger EV market, REPT Battero focused on:⚪ Commercial vehicles (especially heavy-duty trucks)⚪ Ranked #2 in China for NEV truck installations in 2025⚪ Revenue: RMB 10.01B (+35.6%)👉 A clear move toward higher-value niche segments.🌍 Overseas market: from growth driver to profit core⚪ Overseas revenue share: ~80%⚪ 8GWh manufacturing base under development in Indonesia⚪ Customer footprint across Europe, India, Japan, South Korea, etc.👉 Transitioning from export-driven growth to a globalized production + market strategy.👉 More Residential Battery Info:https://lnkd.in/gWP6bPhSSource: #REPTBattero#EnergyStorage#BatteryIndustry#LithiumBattery#BESS#EnergyTransition#CleanEnergy#BatteryMarket#EVBattery#PVESSPLANET… more
